title: Smoked Potato Delight
description: A simple and delicious smoked potato dish, perfect for a quick snack or side.
instructions: 2. Season the smoked flavoring to your liking.
3. Place the sliced potatoes in the smoker, making sure they're in a single layer.
4. Smoke the potatoes for 2 hours, or until they're tender and lightly smoked.
5. Remove the potatoes from the smoker and serve hot.
